title: lithachne horizontalis
intro: Lithachne horizontalis, also known as the Blue Panic Grass or Swamp Blue Panic Grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to Australia and other parts of the world. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Lithachne horizontalis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide relief from pain and fever. In herbal preparations, Lithachne horizontalis is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
